recommendations.title: Happily Ever After
recommendations.overview: Is love compatible with coupledom? And what of freedom and fidelity? These are some of the questions facing two married men.

recommendations.title: The Jews
recommendations.overview: Four separate stories deal with stereotypical ideas about Jews: their alleged influence on politics, the stereotype of Jewish business-mindedness, the Mossad, the Jewish world conspiracy and the memory of the Holocaust.

recommendations.title: The Accusation
recommendations.overview: The Farels are a power couple: Jean is a prominent French pundit and his wife Claire an essayist known for her radical feminism. Together they have a model son, Alexandre, who is a student at a prestigious American university. During a brief visit to

recommendations.title: My Dog Stupid
recommendations.overview: Henri is a middle-aged writer with fading inspiration who has published nothing worthy of note in years. Feeling increasingly misunderstood by his wife and four grown up deadbeat kids, he dreams of running away to start over again. Yet when he discov

recommendations.title: The King's Speech
recommendations.overview: The King's Speech tells the story of the man who became King George VI, the father of Queen Elizabeth II. After his brother abdicates, George ('Bertie') reluctantly assumes the throne. Plagued by a dreaded stutter and considered unfit to be king, Ber

recommendations.title: An Ordinary Case
recommendations.overview: Jean Monier is a disillusioned lawyer, appointed to defend Nicolas Milik, a man accused of murdering his wife. While everything points to his guilt, Monier takes up the case, convinced of his innocence.

recommendations.title: Bad Genius
recommendations.overview: Lynn, a brilliant student, after helping her friends to get the grades they need, develops the idea of starting a much bigger exam-cheating business.

recommendations.title: Scandalous Sex
recommendations.overview: A daughter seeks to restore the reputation of her disgraced father, a wronged college professor. With help of a professional student, she must overcome an ambitious sorority bitch and corrupt college dean.

recommendations.title: New York, I Love You
recommendations.overview: New York, I Love You delves into the intimate lives of New Yorkers as they grapple with, delight in and search for love. Journey from the Diamond District in the heart of Manhattan, through Chinatown and the Upper East Side, towards the Village, into
recommendations.director: Natalie Portman, Shekhar Kapur, Mira Nair, Fatih Akin, Yvan Attal, Jiang Wen, Shunji Iwai, Allen Hughes, Joshua Marston, Brett Ratner, Randall Balsmeyer

recommendations.title: ExTerminators
recommendations.overview: Three women from a rage-therapy group band together to dole out justice to the men who wronged them.
